dataSourceInstructions: Primary data source. Use DAX measures for all numeric aggregations. Dimensions available: dim_date, dim_client, dim_country, dim_merchant, dim_mcc, dim_product, dim_segment, dim_approvalstatus. The fact_filtersession table captures host-app filter context for grounding agent responses to the user current report view.
userDescription: VISA Commercial Spend Analytics Direct Lake semantic model — 250,000 commercial card transactions with 8 dimensions and 9 DAX measures.
